text: In this article, we delve into the journey of transforming a Google Stitch-created design
into a live Nuxt 4 site using Cloud Code and GitHub's SpecKit.
Discover how a spec-driven development approach harnessed AI to create a seamless static site,
highlighting successes and necessary manual adjustments.
Explore creative solutions like custom SVG cursors and syntax highlighting,
showcasing AI's expanding role in design-to-code processes.
Read the full article for a deeper look into this cutting-edge development process.
